content: Do you know where I can find kernel::sync::rcu, because it is referenced in the documents https://rust-for-linux.github.io/docs/kernel/sync/rcu/index.html, but I cannot find it in rust-next. I can only see the patches in the mailing list
It has not been upstream yet, and yes I think it's currently in Danilo's device patchset for upstreaming. Do you have another use case?
I thought whatever is on the latest docs is also on rust-next. Which branch is synced with the docs?

The canonical link is https://rust.docs.kernel.org and for next https://rust.docs.kernel.org/next/

(If you don't end the latter URL with the slash, it redirects you to the one that Alice mentioned, but that is an unfortunate "implementation detail" :)

In general, please see also the other links at the left sidebar in https://rust-for-linux.com
Theodoros Symeonidis has marked this topic as resolved.
